DECLARATION AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHENG, ALEX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF: ALEX ZHENG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SOCAL PACIFIC MF MANAGEMENT CORP IS PRESENT. NOTE: DEFENDANT SOCAL PACIFIC APPEARED IN ZOOM EVEN W/O AUTHORIZATION (NO REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM WAS MADE). APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IS ANDREA ANTOINE. THE JUDGE ALLOWED THE APPEARANCE BY ZOOM. THE MOTION FOR CHANGE VENUE WILL BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. HOWEVER, THE JUDGE WILL CONTINUE TO HEAR THE CASE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
